Headline: 54th/Cermak-bound Pink and Harlem-bound Green Line Service Running with Delays
ShortDescription: 54th/Cermak-bound Pink and Harlem-bound Green Line trains are running with significant delays following earlier signal problems at near Ashland/Lake.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
54th/Cermak-bound Pink and Harlem-bound Green Line trains are running with significant delays following earlier signal problems at near Ashland/Lake.

Some trains and platforms may be busier than usual as crews work to restore normal service.

Shuttle buses will continue to provide connecting service in both directions:

  • Between Clark/Lake and Polk on the Pink Line
  • Between Clark/Lake and Harlem/Lake on the Green Line

Trains are moving and normal service is being restored.

Allow extra travel time.
